channel.title: Codes and Tags
channel.description: Codes and Tags is a blog created by Edwin Torres to share him experiences being Developer, Traveler and Teacher as Full-Stack Developer

item.title: How to generate pixel art in your Github activity
item.description: Do you have lots of white spaces in your Github activity and would you like to fill them with something interesting like pixel art?. Then this article is for you.
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres

item.title: Roadmap Web Developer Front End 2020
item.description: These notes are part of the recommendations of Andrei Neagoie in the Real Web Developer Roadmap 2020
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres

item.title: How to create a triangle in CSS
item.description: Do you know how to create a triangle in CSS without using images?, Well here is a short explanation
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres

item.title: The Complete Web Developer in 2020
item.description: These are my personal notes in the Udemy Course, The Complete Web Developer in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres

item.title: Learning to learn
item.description: These are my personal notes in the Udemy Course, Learning to Learn by Andrei Neagogie.
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres

item.title: Creating my blog with Gatsby and Github Pages
item.description: How to create your own blog using Gatsby and Github Pages.
item.dc:creator: Edwin Torres
